title: matricaria maritima subsp. subpolaris
intro: Matricaria maritima subsp. subpolaris, also known as Arctic marigold, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which contribute to its numerous health benefits. The health benefits of Arctic marigold include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
